name: G.SKILL Trident Z5 RGB Series 64GB (2 x 32GB) PC RAM DDR5 6000 MHz Desktop Memory
highlights: Ushering in a new era of memory performance with ultra-fast data transfer speeds, the Trident Z5 RGB is engineered to high performance and quality standards. Each Trident Z5 RGB memory module is created from hand-screened DDR5 DRAM ICs to achieve high memory performance on DDR5 platforms.

G.SKILL is dedicated to develop performance overclocked memory kits. Developed and optimized on the Intel Core platform, Trident Z5 RGB taps into the speed potential of DDR5 to bring a whole new level of performance to worldwide overclockers and PC enthusiasts.

The Trident Z5 family incorporates hypercar design elements into the iconic Trident heatspreader, creating a sleek and futuristic look. Featuring a black brushed-aluminum strip inset into a metallic silver or matte black body, and topped with a translucent RGB light bar optimized for smooth lighting, the Trident Z5 RGB is ideal for a wide variety of PC build themes.
description: G.SKILL Trident Z5 RGB Series 64GB (2 x 32GB) PC RAM DDR5 6000 MHz Desktop Memory Price in Pakistan Model Brand G.SKILL Series Trident Z5 RGB Series Model F5-6000J3040G32GX2-TZ5RK Details Capacity 64GB (2 x 32GB) Type 288-Pin PC RAM Speed DDR5 6000 (PC5 48000) CAS Latency 30 Voltage 1.40V ECC No Buffered/Registered Unbuffered Multi-channel Kit Dual Channel Kit BIOS/Performance Profile Intel XMP 3.0 Color Black Heat Spreader Yes Features Extreme performance DDR5 memory designed for gaming and PC
